item.title: 谷歌云 Q2：营收增长 82% 达 248 亿美元，积压订单增长 390% 达 5140 亿美元
item.summary: Explosive Q2 results suggest Google Cloud is outperforming rivals where it matters most—winning new AI business and accelerating faster than Microsoft Cloud and AWS. The post Google Cloud Q2: Revenue +82%, $24.8B, Backlog +390%, $514B appeared first on Cloud Wars.
